author: Vincent Voyer
subject: chore(dev/build): hot loader, release process (algolia/react-instantsearch#1272)
body:
* chore(dev/build): hot loader, release process

This BIG commit includes:
- start of release script
- separation between doc building and doc dev (npm start, npm run
build)
- some comment aroud code to avoid confusion

Will then try to release once

* docs(ecommerce): move ecommerce example to HMR
